_comment: PRESET: Google only. Supply Google creds; leave azure empty -> HasAzureCredentials false -> SupportedIdentityProviders = [Google] (COGNITO intentionally omitted, federated-only: C8.3). Secret empty; source from SSM/Secrets Manager at deploy time. managed_login_version: 1 = hosted UI classic, 2 = Managed Login branding (requires a per-client branding style).
